pr.title: Record Submission: 1.1086 BPB - Turbo-Muon + EngramLite + ParamBanking (11L 512d)

output.summary: 11-layer GPT couples Turbo-Muon/parameter banking, EngramLite hash embeddings, U-Net skips, and GPTQ mixed-precision compression within the 16MB budget.
techniques: Turbo-Muon optimizer with AOL preconditioning and banked row_col Newton-Schulz
EngramLite hash embeddings plus U-Net skips and ValueEmbedding to preserve token context
GPTQ int6/int7 mixed precision with Hessian-guided bit allocation and late QAT
